title: Mod Name Tooltip
description: A mod for BTA that adds an item's mod name to it's tooltip.
body:
Mod Name Tooltip is a mod for Better Than Adventure! that adds the mod name of an item to it's tooltip.

This mod also expands the functionality of the creative menu search by allowing you to use the `@` symbol before the name/id of a mod to search for only items/blocks from that mod.

![Example tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca9669e6ec7c2bf5c49a45799c9b176863cde0c.png)

![Searching for items from the Better With Enchanting mod in the creative menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/645fc52d0b9517c0ec52f2deb0d9e2d08a443738.png)
